Germick Family Portal
Home

Soft Granola Bars

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

cup brown sugar -1 cup oil -2 eggs -2 cup oats -1 ½ cup flour -1 tsp baking soda -1 cup raisins or dates -1 cup chopped nuts -1 ½ tsp ground cloves and cinnamon -¼ tsp salt

Honey Glaze: -¼ cups honey -2 tbsp butter

Directions

  1. Heat oven to 350⁰. Grease jelly roll pan. Mix brown sugar, oil eggs in large bowl. Stir in remaining ingredients. Spread in pan with spatula.
  2. Bake 17-22 minutes. Cool. Drizzle with honey glaze.

HONEY GLAZE

  1. Heat in pan over medium heat stirring constantly until butter is melted and mixture is heated through.
